title: Add episode archive back-fill for Dec 2025 - Feb 2026
description: Adds static HTML for the 12 missing episodes and regenerates the episode index. Closes issue #1.
author: rebecca-price

title: Add Covenant Insurance Group sponsor logo and tagline
description: Adds Covenant Insurance Group logo to the sponsors section on the homepage. Updates the sponsor blurb and links to their contact page. Closes issue #2.
author: rebecca-price

title: Update bio page: 2026 headshot and credential list
description: Replaces 2023 headshot with 2026 station photo and updates credential section to include 2024 APC renewal. Closes issue #4.
author: rebecca-price

title: Fix UnicodeEncodeError on em-dash in guest bios
description: Sets UTF-8 encoding explicitly on output file handles in show_notes_gen.py. Also adds a test fixture with an em-dash bio to prevent regression. Closes issue #1.
author: rebecca-price

title: Automate weekly PDF export in CI pipeline
description: Adds a pipeline job to generate show-notes PDFs on each Thursday push and attach them as artifacts. Uses weasyprint in the CI runner. Closes issue #3.
author: marcus-price

title: Add faith-and-mental-health segment outline template
description: New Jinja2 template for faith-and-mental-health episodes. Includes pastoral reflection block, listener call-in prompt, and resource list footer section. Work in progress - not ready for review yet.
author: rebecca-price

title: Handle 12-hour AM/PM time format in CPE CSV import
description: Normalizes time strings to 24-hour format before parsing in the CPE hour importer. Adds test cases for both formats. Closes issue #1.
author: rebecca-price

title: Export 2025 CPE completion report as PDF
description: Adds a report generation command that produces a print-ready PDF summary of all 2025 CPE hours by category. Used for APC renewal submission. Closes issue #3.
author: rebecca-price

title: Add volunteer sign-up form page
description: Static HTML page embedding Google Form for health fair volunteer sign-up. Lists all 8 roles with Sandra Coles already noted as nursing station lead. Closes issue #2.
author: naomi-price

title: Add Mitchell's Flowers seasonal promo rate to invoice template
description: Updates the invoice Jinja2 template to include a seasonal discount line for January-March and corrects the total calculation. Closes issue #2.
author: rebecca-price
